title: Nut-Free-Friendly Bhuna Flaky Steak Stir-fry
description: A salty and flaky date-night Slovakian dish featuring lean minced steak in a bhuna sauce without nuts, perfect for those with dietary restrictions.

ingredients.name: Spices (adjust to taste): chili powder, paprika, salt

instructions: Preheat your wok or pan over medium-high heat. Add sesame oil and stir-fry onions until translucent.
Add minced beef and cook until browned on all sides, breaking it into small pieces as it cooks.
Toss in finely chopped garlic and continue cooking for another minute. Then add tomato puree and chicken/vegetable stock, stirring well to combine.
Reduce heat to medium-low and let the sauce simmer for about 5 minutes until slightly thickened. Season with spices according to preference.
To serve, pour the cooked beef mixture into a serving dish and drizzle over the nut-free-friendly sauce base.
